mapper.select: select task_comment_id, task_id, user_id, content, parent_id, create_by, create_time, update_time from task_comment where task_comment_id = #{taskCommentId}
select task_comment_id, task_id, user_id, content, parent_id, create_by, create_time, update_time from task_comment where task_id = #{taskId} order by create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into task_comment (task_id, user_id, content, parent_id, create_by, create_time, update_time) values (#{taskId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{parentId}, #{createBy}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update task_comment set content = #{content}, update_time = now() where task_comment_id = #{taskCommentId}
mapper.delete: update task_comment set deleted = 1 where task_comment_id = #{taskCommentId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from task_comment where parent_id = #{parentId}
